title: Classic Slots
tagline: 5×3 lines slot; 3+ scatters trigger free spins.
mechanic: Ten paylines, wilds, and a scatter that awards 10–20 free spins. The crucial design choice: the free spins are simulated and paid ATOMICALLY inside the trigger spin — one lump-sum settle at the trigger bet. No cross-round state, so nothing can be replayed or exploited at a different bet.
showcases: a real reel/payline/wild/scatter slot in Lua
free spins resolved in ONE settle (no deferred payout)
the safe baseline — contrast with slots-meta
mathTest: Pure variance, no decisions — the simulator measures RTP directly; host.mark splits base vs free-spin RTP contribution.
